required_skills: Customer-Facing Technical Discovery and Requirement Gathering
Solution Design Document and RFP Response Authoring
Cross-Functional Collaboration between Sales and Engineering
Technical Objection Handling and Competitive Differentiation
Cloud Architecture and Integration Pattern Advisory
preferred_skills: Enterprise Architecture and IT Landscape Assessment
Pricing Model and Commercial Proposal Support
Developer Relations and Community Technical Engagement
Data Integration and ETL Pattern Advisory
Security and Compliance Advisory for Enterprise Buyers
responsibilities: Lead technical discovery sessions with enterprise prospects to understand existing system architecture, integration requirements, and business objectives before proposing tailored solutions
Design and deliver compelling, customized product demonstrations that map platform capabilities directly to prospect pain points and quantifiable business outcomes
Build rapid proof-of-concept integrations using customer APIs, SDKs, and sandbox environments to validate technical feasibility and accelerate deal progression
Author detailed solution design documents, integration architecture diagrams, and RFP technical responses that articulate implementation approaches and risk mitigations
Serve as the primary technical liaison between the sales team and product engineering to surface customer requirements, influence roadmap prioritization, and communicate feature timelines
Handle advanced technical objections around security posture, data residency, scalability limits, and compliance requirements by coordinating with internal subject matter experts
Conduct hands-on technical onboarding workshops for newly contracted customers covering API integration patterns, SDK walkthroughs, and best-practice configuration guidance
Develop and maintain a library of reusable demo environments, sample code repositories, and integration templates that accelerate pre-sales technical activities across the team
Evaluate competitive products and maintain a technical battlecard repository that equips sales teams with accurate differentiation points and counter-positioning narratives
Collaborate with customer success and professional services teams to ensure smooth post-sale technical handoffs with complete solution documentation and integration blueprints
